marstek_unavailable.title: Marstek Modbus entities not found
marstek_unavailable.description: The configured Marstek device no longer exposes the required entities. Verify the marstek_modbus integration.

sensor_unavailable.title: Critical sensor unavailable
sensor_unavailable.description: {name} has been unavailable for too long and the integration switched to Released mode.

modbus_failures.title: Repeated Modbus write failures
modbus_failures.description: {count} consecutive writes failed via marstek_modbus service calls.

user.title: Marstek device
user.description: Select the device exposed by marstek_modbus, or choose manual setup.

manual_devices.title: Manual entities
manual_devices.description: Select each entity that matches the Marstek Venus E roles.

scan_interval_consent.title: Speed up battery polling
scan_interval_consent.description: The Marstek Modbus integration is currently polling the battery every {current} seconds. For best self-consumption performance, we recommend setting this to {recommended} second. The change is applied immediately and can be reverted later in the Marstek Modbus integration's options.

grid_source.title: Grid power source
grid_source.description: Choose how the integration measures grid power. Faster updates produce smoother control.

homewizard_pick.title: Pick a HomeWizard P1 device
homewizard_pick.description: Multiple HomeWizard P1 devices were detected. Pick the one connected to your main meter.

homewizard_manual.title: HomeWizard P1 IP address
homewizard_manual.description: Enter the local IP address of your HomeWizard P1 dongle. The integration will verify that it is reachable and is a P1 meter (not a smart plug or other device).

grid.title: Grid power
grid.description: Select the sensor measuring net grid offtake/injection from your digital meter (any integration that exposes a power-class sensor). Positive values must mean offtake from the grid; negative values mean injection.

optional.title: Optional sensors
optional.description: Optional helpers for capacity tariffs: peak demand for the current quarter-hour and for the current month (power sensors, often from your meter or DSMR integration).

data.cap_now_sensor: Peak demand of the current quarter-hour sensor
data.monthly_peak_sensor: Peak demand of the current month sensor

parameters.title: Initial parameters
parameters.description: Defaults for SoC limits, peak window timing, boost/reserve settings, and smoothing. Everything can be changed later on the device page.

error.internal_error: Unexpected error in this step. Details are in home-assistant.log (search for marstek_battery_controller).
error.discovery_failed: Roles could not be resolved on this device.
error.device_required: Select a Marstek device or enable manual setup.
error.homewizard_unreachable: Could not reach the HomeWizard at this IP. Verify the address and that the local API is enabled.
error.homewizard_wrong_product: This device is not a HomeWizard P1 meter. Smart plugs and other HomeWizard devices cannot be used as a grid power source.
error.invalid_min_max_soc: Min SoC must be less than max SoC.
error.evening_charge_too_high: Boost charge power cannot exceed maximum battery power.
error.manual_power_too_high: Manual power cannot exceed max battery power.
